_value.title: Google Stock Price Prediction: Mizuho Lifts GOOGL Target to $460 as...
_value.description: Of 34 analysts who issued GOOGL targets in the past six months, the median sits at $412.50 and the mean at $434.27. Mizuho's Lloyd Walmsley raised his target to $460 from $420 on May 6, anchoring his thesis to a 30x multiple on his 2027 GAAP EPS estimate of about $15.
